_logger.LogInformation(
    "DIA Dataverse staging create started. Table: {TableName}, FileName: {FileName}, FileType: {FileType}.",
    "icow_deceasedestatestaging",
    filename,
    fileType);

_logger.LogInformation(
    "DIA Dataverse staging create succeeded. RecordId: {RecordId}, FileName: {FileName}.",
    recordId,
    filename);


--------------------

_logger.LogInformation(
    "DIA Dataverse file upload started. Table: {TableName}, RecordId: {RecordId}, FileColumn: {FileColumn}, FileName: {FileName}, StreamLength: {StreamLength}.",
    "icow_deceasedestatestaging",
    recordId,
    "icow_file",
    filename,
    outputStream.Length);


_logger.LogInformation(
    "DIA Dataverse file upload succeeded. RecordId: {RecordId}, FileName: {FileName}.",
    recordId,
    filename);

================================

_logger.LogWarning(
    ex,
    "DIA Dataverse staging save attempt {Attempt} of {MaxAttempts} failed for file {FileName}. Error: {ErrorMessage}. Retrying after {RetryDelayMilliseconds} ms.",
    attempt,
    maxAttempts,
    filename,
    ex.Message,
    retryDelayMilliseconds);


_logger.LogError(
    ex,
    "DIA Dataverse staging save failed after {MaxAttempts} attempts for file {FileName}.",
    maxAttempts,
    filename);
